eng.definition: curious or unusual in a way that provokes dry amusement
examples: His droll sense of humor was appreciated by his friends.
The movie was filled with droll characters, making it a delightful comedy.
The speaker shared a droll anecdote during his speech.
मुझे उनकी आवाज़ बहुत पसंद है।
संगीत में आवाज़ का महत्वपूर्ण योगदान होता है।
